title: Devil May Cry Weapons
description: Adds Devil May Cry Weapons into Minecraft
body:
<center>

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZlEtmo8.png)

# Adds the various weapons from the DMC game series to Minecraft

## How to Find Them:

You can now find all the weapons randomly in loot chests found in mines, strongholds, desert pyramids, jungle temples, underwater ruins and village blacksmiths. If you have Mine and Slash installed, they can be added to the drop system.

## Weapons Added/Model Credits:

Yamato: https://www.deviantart.com/mr-mecha-man/art/MMD-DMC-5-Vergil-s-Weapon-pack-DL-793263179

Red Queen: https://www.deviantart.com/mr-mecha-man/art/MMD-DMC-5-Nero-s-Weapon-pack-DL-793266385

Rebellion, Devil Sword Dante, Ivory, Ebony, and Spada: https://www.deviantart.com/mr-mecha-man/art/MMD-DMC-5-Dante-s-Weapon-pack-DL-793263079

## Find this mod updated to 1.16+ [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/devil-may-cry-weapons-reborn)

</center>
